competitors.name: CoinMarketCap
weaknesses: Basic features only
Limited advanced analytics
No direct exchange API sync (manual entry)
No tax reporting tools
Portfolio data not persistent across devices without account

competitors.name: CoinGecko
weaknesses: Portfolio tracker is a secondary feature
UI can feel cluttered
Manual entry or limited CSV import
Lacks sophisticated performance charts
No automated trade syncing for most exchanges

competitors.name: CoinStats
weaknesses: Free tier is very limited (2 portfolios, 1 exchange)
Premium pricing is relatively high
Can be overwhelming for beginners
Occasional sync issues reported
Web interface less polished than mobile

competitors.name: Koinly
features: Primary focus on crypto tax reporting
Generates tax forms for many countries
Clear audit trail and cost basis methods
weaknesses: Portfolio tracking is secondary to tax prep
Expensive for active traders (pricing based on transactions)
UI is functional but not beautiful
Real-time portfolio value can be laggy
Overkill for users who just want to track, not tax

competitors.name: Delta Investment Tracker
features: Tracks crypto, stocks, NFTs in one place
weaknesses: Advanced features locked behind Pro subscription
Crypto-specific depth less than specialists
Some users report slow sync speeds
Limited DeFi tracking compared to rivals
Portfolio analysis can be surface-level

gaps.implementation: Build a tracker that uses local encryption (client-side) for portfolio data. Offer optional, anonymous peer-to-peer price/data syncing. No email or KYC required. Position as the 'offline-first' portfolio tool.

Create an extremely focused tool with a 3-step setup: 1) Select coins, 2) Enter amounts, 3) See total. Remove all advanced charts, news, and market data. Use large, clear typography and a single 'All-Time Profit/Loss' figure.

Implement anonymized, opt-in benchmarking. Allow users to compare their portfolio's risk profile, asset allocation, and performance against aggregates (e.g., 'top 10% of portfolios', 'similar ETH-heavy portfolios'). Focus on insights, not just raw data.

gaps.gap: Integrated On-Chain Wallet Analysis & Security Scoring
gaps.implementation: Connect to wallet addresses (read-only) to auto-track holdings and transactions. Layer on a security audit: flag risky token approvals, exposure to hacked contracts, and wallet concentration risk. Partner with security firms for data.

Build a tool that lets users model portfolio changes: 'What if I sold 50% of my BTC and bought ETH and SOL?' Show projected P&L, new allocation pie chart, and risk metrics. Save and compare multiple scenarios.

recommended_positioning: The intelligent, privacy-focused crypto portfolio tracker that helps you understand your risk and performance beyond just the bottom line.
